'''Tagg Pierce''' was the leader of the [[Laramus Base Irregulars]] mercenary group. A former [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], he displayed a contempt for line officers.
